prompt: I want to upgrade this Recipe App KMP project to AGP 9.0. Currently on AGP 8.12.3. The shared module uses kotlin.multiplatform + com.android.library. The androidApp, tvApp, and automotiveApp modules each use kotlin.multiplatform + com.android.application (incompatible with AGP 9). Please do the full migration.
source: Recipe App — shared is KMP+library (Path A), androidApp/tvApp/automotiveApp have KMP+application (Path B)
agent_rubric: The shared module's com.android.library plugin is replaced with com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library
The shared module's android {} block is nested inside kotlin { }
The androidApp module no longer applies kotlin.multiplatform (pure Android app with com.android.application only)
The version catalog has a plugin alias for com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library
AGP version in gradle/libs.versions.toml is updated to 9.0.0 or higher
Gradle wrapper in gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties is updated to 9.1.0 or higher
No removed gradle properties are present in gradle.properties (android.enableLegacyVariantApi, android.r8.integratedResourceShrinking, android.enableNewResourceShrinker.preciseShrinking)
The migration does not break the existing dependency structure between modules
